summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Oyo Biz business directory app. All requested features verified: Login page, Signup page, Admin Dashboard (redirects to login when unauthenticated), User Dashboard (redirects to login when unauthenticated), Home page, Search page, and Navigation bar all load and function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warnings about missing useEffect dependencies in Login.jsx, BusinessDetail.jsx, OwnerDashboard.jsx, UserDashboard.jsx - these are non-critical and don't affect functionality
Minor lint error in Login.jsx line 152: apostrophe should be escaped - cosmetic issue only
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React + Supabase serverless app. No backend API testing needed as all operations go directly to Supabase. Testing verified: 1) Homepage loads with search form, stats, categories, 2) Login page loads with email/password form, 3) Signup page loads with account type selection (Regular User/Business Owner), 4) Admin Dashboard redirects to login when unauthenticated, 5) User Dashboard redirects to login when unauthenticated, 6) Search page loads with filters, 7) All navigation links work correctly. The admin functionality (delete user, change role) requires admin login which cannot be tested without credentials.

login_page.details: Login form loads correctly with email, password inputs and submit button

signup_page.details: Signup form loads with account type selection (Regular User/Business Owner)

admin_dashboard.details: Correctly redirects to login when not authenticated. Code review confirms deleteUser function with confirmation and updateUserRole function are implemented

user_dashboard.details: Correctly redirects to login when not authenticated

homepage.details: Renders with search form, stats (0+ Businesses, 13 Categories, 14 Cities), and navigation

navigation.details: Search, List Business, Log In, Sign Up links all work correctly

search_page.details: Loads with search input, category/city filters

login_redirect_for_owners.details: redirectBasedOnRole function correctly sends owners to '/' (homepage)

delete_user_functionality.details: deleteUser function with confirmation dialog, deletes businesses, reviews, favorites, comments, then user

role_change_functionality.details: updateUserRole function updates user role in Supabase

users_table_with_delete.details: Users tab with table showing name, email, role, joined date, role change dropdown, and delete button
